description: Tools for searching, checking availability, and booking hotels in Cambodia. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these tools to help users find and book accommodations.

tools.name: list_hotels
tools.description: Search and filter hotels available in Cambodia. Use this tool when the user wants to browse hotels, asks about accommodation options, or provides preferences like star rating. Returns a paginated list of hotel summaries.
tools.returns: Paginated list of hotels with id, starRating, images, amenities, latitude, longitude, name, address, description

tools.name: get_hotel_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific hotel by its UUID. Use this when the user selects a hotel or wants more information about a specific property.
tools.returns: Full hotel details including id, starRating, images, amenities, latitude, longitude, translated name/address/description

tools.name: get_hotel_rooms
tools.description: List rooms for a hotel with availability for a given date range. Always call this before creating a booking to confirm availability and get room options.
tools.returns: Array of rooms with id, roomType, priceUsd (per night), maxOccupancy, isAvailable

tools.name: create_hotel_booking
tools.description: Create a hotel room booking with a 15-minute hold. Use this after confirming availability and getting user consent. The booking enters HOLD status until payment is completed. Requires user authentication. Supports Idempotency-Key header to prevent duplicate bookings.

Idempotency-Key.description: Optional unique key to prevent duplicate bookings on retry

specialRequests.description: Special requests from the user (max 1000 chars)

tools.returns: BookingDetail with id, reference, status (HOLD), totalUsd, subtotalUsd, expiresAt (15 min), items[]
